ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "calendar_year" TEXT /* Calendar year of the data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the data (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the data (January, February, etc.) */,
  "cash_salary_increase" REAL /* Rate of increase in cash salary over the previous year/term (%) */,
  "job_openings_to_applicants_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of active job openings to applicants (times) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate (%) */,
  "m2_increase" REAL /* Rate of increase in M2 money supply over the previous year/term (%) */,
  "balance_of_payments_trade" REAL /* Trade balance (trillion yen) */,
  "balance_of_payments_current" REAL /* Current balance (trillion yen) */,
  "yen_dollar_rate" REAL /* Average Yen/Dollar exchange rate during the term */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "indicator_values" TEXT /* JSON object containing values for multiple indicators */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_revised_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last revised */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, financial institution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source's website or data repository */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "source_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the source (1-10) */,
  "source_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "indicator_formula" TEXT /* Formula or methodology used to calculate the indicator */,
  "indicator_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance or significance of the indicator in economic analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_indicators" (
  "data_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data-indicator mapping */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Job title or position of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly, special) */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report (e.g., public, internal) */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and categorization */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
